verses.text: A man with a withered hand is watched, to see if He will heal on the sabbath. Watching to accuse. They care more to catch Him than to see a man healed.
A man with a withered hand is watched, to see if He will heal on the sabbath. Watching to accuse. They care more to catch Him than to see a man healed.
'Is it lawful to do good on the sabbath?' grieved at their hardness, He heals the hand. Holy anger. He is moved by their cruel, stony hearts.
'Is it lawful to do good on the sabbath?' grieved at their hardness, He heals the hand. Holy anger. He is moved by their cruel, stony hearts.
'Is it lawful to do good on the sabbath?' grieved at their hardness, He heals the hand. Holy anger. He is moved by their cruel, stony hearts.
The Pharisees plot with the Herodians to destroy Him; yet great multitudes follow. Hatred and hunger. As foes scheme, the crowds seek His mercy.
The Pharisees plot with the Herodians to destroy Him; yet great multitudes follow. Hatred and hunger. As foes scheme, the crowds seek His mercy.
The Pharisees plot with the Herodians to destroy Him; yet great multitudes follow. Hatred and hunger. As foes scheme, the crowds seek His mercy.
He heals many, and the unclean spirits cry, 'Thou art the Son of God'; He charges silence. Even demons know. They confess what men deny.
He heals many, and the unclean spirits cry, 'Thou art the Son of God'; He charges silence. Even demons know. They confess what men deny.
He heals many, and the unclean spirits cry, 'Thou art the Son of God'; He charges silence. Even demons know. They confess what men deny.
He heals many, and the unclean spirits cry, 'Thou art the Son of God'; He charges silence. Even demons know. They confess what men deny.
He ordains twelve 'that they should be with him,' and to be sent to preach and heal. Chosen and sent. First companions, then commissioned.
He ordains twelve 'that they should be with him,' and to be sent to preach and heal. Chosen and sent. First companions, then commissioned.
He ordains twelve 'that they should be with him,' and to be sent to preach and heal. Chosen and sent. First companions, then commissioned.
He names the twelve, ending with 'Judas Iscariot, which also betrayed him.' A solemn name. Even the inner circle held a traitor.

He names the twelve, ending with 'Judas Iscariot, which also betrayed him.' A solemn name. Even the inner circle held a traitor.
The scribes say, 'He hath Beelzebub,' casting out devils by the prince of devils. Vile charge. They name the Spirit's work as Satan's.
The scribes say, 'He hath Beelzebub,' casting out devils by the prince of devils. Vile charge. They name the Spirit's work as Satan's.
The scribes say, 'He hath Beelzebub,' casting out devils by the prince of devils. Vile charge. They name the Spirit's work as Satan's.
How can Satan cast out Satan? a kingdom divided cannot stand. Plain logic. His victories over demons prove He is no friend of theirs.

How can Satan cast out Satan? a kingdom divided cannot stand. Plain logic. His victories over demons prove He is no friend of theirs.
None spoils the strong man's house unless he binds him; blasphemy against the Holy Ghost 'hath never forgiveness.' Solemn warning. To call the Spirit's work the devil's is to harden past pardon.

His mother and brethren stand without and send for Him. Earthly ties. Even family must not interrupt His Father's work.
His mother and brethren stand without and send for Him. Earthly ties. Even family must not interrupt His Father's work.
'Whosoever shall do the will of God, the same is my brother, and... mother.' Family of faith. Obedience binds us closest to Christ.
